title: lotus aegaeus
intro: Lotus aegaeus, also known as Lotus corniculatus ssp. aegaeus, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lotus aegaeus include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its use in treating gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions. Traditionally, Lotus aegaeus is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture or capsule form for medicinal purposes.
